findings.item: Front STT providers with a stateful fallback adapter and background recovery probes
findings.cited: _clones/agents/livekit-agents/livekit/agents/stt/fallback_adapter.py:41-105, :175-248; "default hot-path max_retry=0 inside the fallback wrapper"
findings.issue: The max_retry=0 figure is real but lives at fallback_adapter.py:23-24 (DEFAULT_FALLBACK_API_CONNECT_OPTIONS = APIConnectOptions(max_retry=0, timeout=DEFAULT_API_CONNECT_OPTIONS.timeout)), which is ABOVE the cited range 41-105. The cited 41-105 is the class def + __init__ where the only retry default is max_retry_per_stt: int = 1 (line 54), not 0. attempt_timeout default 10.0 (line 53) is correct. The mechanism (stateful skip + background recovery via _try_recovery) is correctly cited at 175-248.
findings.correct: Add :23-24 to the citation for the max_retry=0 hot-path conn_options; note per-STT retry default is max_retry_per_stt=1 (line 54), distinct from the per-call max_retry=0.

summary: STT Ingestion section is well-aligned. All 16 code citations open to the claimed mechanism (Deepgram streaming socket, interim/final typing, confidence threshold at stt_callback.go:60-78, resample at _input.py:368, keyterm/keywords mapping nova-2->Keywords/nova-3->Keyterm at deepgram.go:92-117, 0.5s preroll at gemini_live llm.py:123, StreamAdapter interim_results=False, FallbackAdapter recovery). Numbers verified: Deepgram 10s idle / 5s keepalive, linear16 default, 0.5s preroll + 0.1s autosized margin, attempt_timeout 10.0. All Evidence notes (STT-01..13, BARGE-06) exist and match topics. Only finding: item 8's max_retry=0 default is genuine (line 23-24) but sits just outside the cited line range, while the cited range's actual retry default is max_retry_per_stt=1 - a citation-precision MINOR, not a wrong number.
